subject: A figure with short dark hair removing or holding a mask with a glowing gem, in a dark blue-toned environment
description: A close-up scene showing two faces in proximity. The foreground face belongs to a figure with short dark hair, visible from mid-face up, looking slightly downward. This figure holds or removes a pale mask from another face below — the mask has a circular glowing purple-blue gem set into it. A thin, luminous thread or cord connects the mask to the other figure. The scene is deeply saturated in blue and dark tones, with the glowing gem as the primary light source. Fallen leaves or debris are visible in the very background. The image reads as an act of memory extraction or identity erasure — a Dimir operative at work.
foreground: Dark-haired figure holding a glowing gem-set mask over another face
background: Dark blue environment with scattered leaf debris
emotion: clinical detachment, act of violation performed with precision
